narrative:
Pike County has 17,029 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a clear Republican lean of 6.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.8% of registrants.
